text: Interconnection queue congestion: Over 290 GW of projects are stuck waiting to connect to the grid — only 15 % will clear.
CAISO's 2023 interconnection queue is exploding. Cluster 14: 94 GW. Cluster 15: 347 GW. That's 3x the capacity needed for CA's 2045 goals.

India's fast-breeder reactor reaches criticality. Russia is the only country with a fast breeder operating at commercial scale.
